summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MockMate AI Interview Practice Platform. Backend APIs working correctly with proper authentication. Frontend loads perfectly with responsive design and proper route protection.
passed_tests: Root API endpoint returns correct status
Protected routes return 401 for unauthorized access
Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, tracks, pricing)
Navigation links work correctly (Features, Tracks, Pricing)
Start Free button triggers OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com
Pricing section displays Free and Pro plans
Protected routes (dashboard, settings, progress, interview, report) properly redirect unauthenticated users
Responsive design works on mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), and desktop (1920x1080)
Smooth scrolling and animations work correctly
